title: Chapter 10
text: 2 Lighting Out The technology underlying cell repair systems will allow people to change their bodies in ways that range from the trivial to the amazing to the bizarre. Such changes have few obvious limits. Some people may shed human form as a caterpillar transforms itself to take to the air; others may bring plain humanity to a new perfection. Some people will simply cure their warts, ignore the new butterflies, and go fishing. —Eric Drexler, Engines of Creation “Then I set out a line to catch a fish for breakfast.” —Huck Finn
